name: HWR_SAVED_SEARCH_VL
query: SELECT B.SEARCH_ID, B.SEARCH_OWNER, T.NAME, B.COMPONENT_KEY, B.SEARCH_MODE, B.FILTER, B.SEARCH_ORDER, B.IS_AUTO_RUN, B.IS_DEFAULT, B.IS_HIDDEN, B.IS_SEEDED_DATA, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_SAVED_SEARCH_B B, HWR_SAVED_SEARCH_TL T WHERE B.SEARCH_ID = T.SEARCH_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
